title: Briefing Forge Room (code-ready)
public_claim: BriefingForgeRoom is a MuranoOS "flagship epistemic room" that transforms dense source material (reports, cables, transcripts, open-source feeds) into audience-specific decision-grade briefing products without losing provenance, uncertainty, dissent, framing logic, or delivery discipline.
distinctive_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
